items.name: Three Point Lighting
items.text:
Key light positioned to one side of the subject at moderate height.
Fill light placed opposite key light to soften shadows without eliminating them.
Rim light positioned behind the subject to separate silhouette from background.
Balanced professional portrait lighting design.
Soft diffused lighting with controlled shadow gradients.
Even exposure across subject with mild contrast.
Studio photography lighting style.
Neutral or seamless background.
Clean commercial portrait illumination.
Controlled highlight and shadow placement.
Softbox-diffused quality light with smooth falloff.
Grid-modified directional lighting for precision control.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Butterfly Lighting
items.text:
Key light positioned directly in front and above the subject.
Soft shadow directly beneath the nose forming a butterfly-shaped shadow.
Even facial illumination with subtle cheek shadows.
Beauty lighting setup for symmetrical facial presentation.
Soft glamour portrait lighting.
Minimal harsh shadows.
Clean studio background lighting.
Emphasizes facial symmetry and smooth skin rendering.
Classic fashion photography lighting style.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Rembrandt Lighting
items.text:
Low-key cinematic lighting setup.
Single key light positioned above and to the side of the subject.
Light angled at approximately 30–45 degrees from camera axis.
Soft falloff into deep shadows on the far side of the face.
Distinct triangular highlight on the shadow-side cheek beneath the eye.
Strong chiaroscuro contrast between light and shadow planes.
Dark, subdued background with minimal ambient fill light.
Sculptural facial definition shaped by directional lighting.
Moody portrait illumination with dramatic depth.
Classic painterly portrait lighting style.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Split Lighting
items.text:
Single light source illuminating exactly one half of the subject’s face.
Other half in deep shadow with sharp tonal separation.
High contrast dramatic lighting setup.
Strong chiaroscuro division across facial plane.
Moody cinematic tension lighting.
Emphasizes duality and psychological intensity.
Minimal fill light.
Dark atmospheric background.
Highly directional lighting design.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Rim Lighting
items.text:
Strong backlight outlining the subject’s silhouette.
Light tracing edges of hair, shoulders, and body contours.
Foreground mostly in shadow with glowing edge separation.
Cinematic subject-background separation.
Dramatic atmospheric lighting.
Soft or dark front lighting with minimal facial fill.
Emphasizes form outline and depth layering.
Fantasy and cinematic hero lighting style.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.text:
Single warm light source from candle or flame.
Flickering uneven illumination across subject.
Strong warm highlights and deep organic shadows.
High contrast low-light environment.
Soft shadow movement and natural falloff.
Baroque and historical painting lighting style.
Intimate atmospheric mood.
Warm golden-orange color temperature.
Dark surrounding environment with localized illumination.

items.text:

Fantasy oil painting lighting style.
Baroque-inspired chiaroscuro composition.
Emphasizes muscle, fabric, and environmental texture.
Warm earth-tone color palette.
Cinematic fantasy atmosphere lighting.
Deep shadow layering with glowing highlights.

items.text:
Visible light rays passing through atmospheric particles.
Soft directional beams of light.
God rays filtering through environment.
Subtle haze and depth-based light scattering.
Cinematic atmospheric lighting effect.
Light shafts interacting with environment geometry.
Controlled bloom without overexposure.
Fantasy and sci-fi environmental illumination.
Depth-enhancing atmospheric perspective lighting.

Cool color temperature dominance.
